---
title: "logistic regression model"
author: "Erika Nares"
date: "2026-06-02"
output: html_document
---


```{r}

library(tidymodels)
library(yardstick)
library(glmnet)
library(vip)
```

```{r}
df <- read.csv("final_series_df.csv")

abbr_map <- c(
  "Atlanta Hawks" = "ATL",
  "Boston Celtics" = "BOS",
  "Brooklyn Nets" = "BKN",
  "Charlotte Hornets" = "CHA",
  "Chicago Bulls" = "CHI",
  "Cleveland Cavaliers" = "CLE",
  "Dallas Mavericks" = "DAL",
  "Denver Nuggets" = "DEN",
  "Detroit Pistons" = "DET",
  "Golden State Warriors" = "GSW",
  "Houston Rockets" = "HOU",
  "Indiana Pacers" = "IND",
  "LA Clippers" = "LAC",
  "Los Angeles Clippers" = "LAC",
  "Los Angeles Lakers" = "LAL",
  "Memphis Grizzlies" = "MEM",
  "Miami Heat" = "MIA",
  "Milwaukee Bucks" = "MIL",
  "Minnesota Timberwolves" = "MIN",
  "New Orleans Pelicans" = "NOP",
  "New York Knicks" = "NYK",
  "Oklahoma City Thunder" = "OKC",
  "Orlando Magic" = "ORL",
  "Philadelphia 76ers" = "PHI",
  "Phoenix Suns" = "PHX",
  "Portland Trail Blazers" = "POR",
  "Sacramento Kings" = "SAC",
  "San Antonio Spurs" = "SAS",
  "Toronto Raptors" = "TOR",
  "Utah Jazz" = "UTA",
  "Washington Wizards" = "WAS"
)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    TEAM_A_ABBR = abbr_map[TEAM_A],
    TEAM_B_ABBR = abbr_map[TEAM_B]
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    WINNER = factor(
      WINNER,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("TEAM_B", "TEAM_A")
    )
  )

# -----------------------------
# Train/Test Split
# -----------------------------
train_final_df <- df %>%
  filter(season != "2025-26")

test_final_df <- df %>%
  filter(season == "2025-26") %>%
  filter(season == "2025-26", SERIES_ID != "New York Knicks vs San Antonio Spurs")
```



```{r}
final_series_df <- df %>% mutate(WINNER = as.factor(WINNER))
final_series_df
```


```{r}
set.seed(31)
nba_folds <- vfold_cv(train_final_df, v = 5, strata=WINNER)
```

```{r}
nrow(train_final_df)
```

```{r}
set.seed(31)
nba_recipe <- recipe(
  WINNER ~ WIN_PCT_DIFF + NET_RATING_DIFF + TS_DIFF + THREE_PT_DIFF  + OFF_RATING_DIFF + DEF_RATING_DIFF + EFG_DIFF + OREB_DIFF + TOV_DIFF + PLUS_MINUS_DIFF + SRS_DIFF + H2H_TS_PCT_DIFF + H2H_WIN_PCT_DIFF + H2H_EFG_PCT_DIFF + H2H_POINT_DIFF_DIFF,
  data = train_final_df
) %>% 
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

prep(nba_recipe) %>% bake(new_data = train_final_df) %>% slice(1:3)
```

```{r}
log_mod_model <- logistic_reg(
  penalty = tune(),
  mixture = tune()
) %>%
  set_engine("glmnet") %>%
  set_mode("classification")
```

```{r}
logistic_wflow <- workflow() %>%
  add_model(log_mod_model) %>%
  add_recipe(nba_recipe)
```

```{r}
log_grid <- grid_regular(
  penalty(range = c(-4, 0)),
  mixture(),
  levels = 5
)
```

```{r}
set.seed(31)

logreg_fit <- tune_grid(
  logistic_wflow,
  resamples = nba_folds,
  grid = log_grid,
  metrics = metric_set(accuracy, roc_auc)
)
```

```{r}
best_logreg <- select_best(
  logreg_fit,
  metric = "roc_auc"
)

final_log_wflow <- finalize_workflow(
  logistic_wflow,
  best_logreg
)

final_log_fit <- fit(
  final_log_wflow,
  data = train_final_df
)
```



```{r}
tidy(
  extract_fit_parsnip(final_log_fit)
)
```

```{r}
logreg_summary <- collect_metrics(logreg_fit) %>%
  filter(.metric == "roc_auc") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean))

logreg_summary
```


```{r}
set.seed(31)
best_logreg_model <- select_best(logreg_fit, metric = "roc_auc")
best_logreg_model
```
The best model is with penalty = 0.1 and mixture = 0.25

```{r}
set.seed(31)
final_logreg_wf <- finalize_workflow(logistic_wflow, best_logreg_model)
```

```{r}
set.seed(31)
final_logreg_fit <- fit(final_logreg_wf, train_final_df)
```

```{r}
augment(final_logreg_fit, new_data = test_final_df) %>% slice(1:5)
```

```{r}
augment(final_logreg_fit, new_data = test_final_df) %>%
  roc_auc(
    truth = WINNER,
    .pred_TEAM_A,
    event_level = "second"
  )
```
```{r}
log_reg_preds <- predict(
  final_logreg_fit,
  test_final_df,
  type = "prob"
) %>%
  bind_cols(
    predict(final_logreg_fit, test_final_df)
  ) %>%
  bind_cols(test_final_df)
```

```{r}
log_reg_preds
```

```{r}
log_reg_preds %>%
  metrics(
    truth = WINNER,
    estimate = .pred_class
  )
```

```{r}
log_reg_preds %>%
  conf_mat(
    truth = WINNER,
    estimate = .pred_class
  )
```
```{r}
logreg_imp <- tidy(
  extract_fit_parsnip(final_logreg_fit)
) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    Importance = abs(estimate)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Importance))

logreg_imp_top10 <- logreg_imp %>%
  slice_head(n = 5)

ggplot(logreg_imp_top10, aes(
  x = reorder(term, Importance),
  y = Importance
)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2C7FB8") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Most Important Predictors in NBA Playoffs",
    subtitle = "Elastic Net Logistic Regression (Absolute Coefficient Size)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Absolute Coefficient"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  )
```


```{r}
logreg_preds <- augment(
  final_logreg_fit,
  new_data = test_final_df
)

logreg_preds_table <- logreg_preds %>%
  mutate(
    TEAM_A_ABBR = abbr_map[TEAM_A],
    TEAM_B_ABBR = abbr_map[TEAM_B],
    Actual_Winner = if_else(WINNER == "TEAM_A", TEAM_A_ABBR, TEAM_B_ABBR),
    Predicted_Winner = if_else(.pred_class == "TEAM_A", TEAM_A_ABBR, TEAM_B_ABBR),
    Confidence = if_else(.pred_class == "TEAM_A", .pred_TEAM_A, .pred_TEAM_B),
    Correct = Actual_Winner == Predicted_Winner
  ) %>%
  select(
    TEAM_A = TEAM_A_ABBR,
    TEAM_B = TEAM_B_ABBR,
    Actual_Winner,
    Predicted_Winner,
    Confidence,
    Prob_TEAM_A = .pred_TEAM_A,
    Prob_TEAM_B = .pred_TEAM_B,
    SERIES_SCORE,
    Correct
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Confidence))

logreg_preds_table %>%
  mutate(Correct = NULL) %>%
  kable(
    digits = 3,
    caption = "Elastic Net Logistic Regression Predictions Sorted by Confidence (Green = Correct)"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
    full_width = FALSE,
    font_size = 12
  ) %>%
  row_spec(
    which(logreg_preds_table$Correct),
    background = "#d4f7d4"
  )
```

```{r}
finals_obs <- df %>%
  filter(
    season == "2025-26",
    SERIES_ID == "New York Knicks vs San Antonio Spurs"
  )
```

```{r}
finals_probs <- predict(final_logreg_fit, finals_obs, type = "prob")
finals_class <- predict(final_logreg_fit, finals_obs)

finals_prediction_table <- finals_obs %>%
  select(TEAM_A = TEAM_A_ABBR, TEAM_B = TEAM_B_ABBR) %>%
  bind_cols(finals_class, finals_probs) %>%
  mutate(
    Predicted_Winner = if_else(.pred_class == "TEAM_A", TEAM_A, TEAM_B),
    Confidence = if_else(.pred_class == "TEAM_A", .pred_TEAM_A, .pred_TEAM_B)
  ) %>%
  select(
    TEAM_A, 
    TEAM_B, 
    Predicted_Winner, 
    Confidence, 
    Prob_TEAM_A = .pred_TEAM_A, 
    Prob_TEAM_B = .pred_TEAM_B
  )
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Finals Prediction: Knicks vs Spurs
# -----------------------------

finals_obs <- df %>%
  filter(
    season == "2025-26",
    SERIES_ID == "New York Knicks vs San Antonio Spurs"
  )

finals_probs <- predict(
  final_logreg_fit,
  finals_obs,
  type = "prob"
)

finals_class <- predict(
  final_logreg_fit,
  finals_obs
)

finals_prediction_table <- finals_obs %>%
  mutate(
    TEAM_A_DISPLAY = paste0(TEAM_A_ABBR, " (3)"),
    TEAM_B_DISPLAY = paste0(TEAM_B_ABBR, " (2)")
  ) %>%
  select(
    TEAM_A = TEAM_A_DISPLAY,
    TEAM_B = TEAM_B_DISPLAY
  ) %>%
  bind_cols(
    finals_class,
    finals_probs
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Predicted_Winner = if_else(
      .pred_class == "TEAM_A",
      TEAM_A,
      TEAM_B
    ),
    Confidence = if_else(
      .pred_class == "TEAM_A",
      .pred_TEAM_A,
      .pred_TEAM_B
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    TEAM_A,
    TEAM_B,
    Predicted_Winner,
    Confidence,
    Prob_TEAM_A = .pred_TEAM_A,
    Prob_TEAM_B = .pred_TEAM_B
  )

finals_prediction_table

```

```{r}
predictor_vars <- c(
  "WIN_PCT_DIFF",
  "NET_RATING_DIFF",
  "TS_DIFF",
  "THREE_PT_DIFF",
  "OFF_RATING_DIFF",
  "DEF_RATING_DIFF",
  "EFG_DIFF",
  "OREB_DIFF",
  "TOV_DIFF",
  "PLUS_MINUS_DIFF",
  "SRS_DIFF",
  "H2H_TS_PCT_DIFF",
  "H2H_WIN_PCT_DIFF",
  "H2H_EFG_PCT_DIFF",
  "H2H_POINT_DIFF_DIFF"
)

train_cor_df <- train_final_df %>%
  mutate(
    WINNER_NUM = ifelse(WINNER == "TEAM_A", 1, 0)
  )

predictor_correlations <- tibble(
  Variable = predictor_vars,
  Correlation = map_dbl(
    predictor_vars,
    ~ cor(
      train_cor_df[[.x]],
      train_cor_df$WINNER_NUM,
      use = "complete.obs"
    )
  )
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(Correlation)))

predictor_correlations



```

```{r}
p <- ggplot(
  top5_correlations,
  aes(
    x = reorder(Variable, abs(Correlation)),
    y = abs(Correlation)
  )
) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2C7FB8") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title =  "Top 10 Predictors of Playoff Series Winners",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Absolute Correlation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  )

p

ggsave(
  "top10_predictors.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)



```
